theme: Adaptive named anchors in snapshot Step 7 + 10-scenario stress test (REVERTED in v2.8.3)
summary: Attempt to scaffold the synthesis paragraph for fast scanning without re-importing form-fill: 2-4 adaptive named anchors per snapshot, agent chooses based on what is load-bearing for THIS product in THIS niche. Open list of canonical anchors provided ('Le vrai pitch', 'La cible logique', 'L'angle commercial', 'Ce que tu n'as peut-être pas vu', 'Le signal dissonant', 'L'opportunité non-exploitée', + free-form). Hard limits: 2-4 max, never empty, never template-flavored, never the same 4 anchors every brand. Stress test harness shipped: 10 scenarios across distinct verticals, scenarios.json + run.py (Anthropic SDK) + results.md author verdict. Findings: 9/10 syntheses produced real insights, anchor diversity strong, 100% doctrine compliance. WALKED BACK in v2.8.3 — live test on an early-stage DTC pilot + Largo feedback ('pas fan des anchors en gras') confirmed bold anchors feel template-flavored visually.

changes.reason: Step 7 hard rules add adaptive named anchors (2-4 max, bold one-line title + 2-4 sentences dense prose, blank line between, open canonical list, decisive test against template-flavor).
10 brand scenarios across distinct verticals + signal densities.
Stress test harness using Anthropic SDK to run the snapshot Step 7 prompt against each scenario.
Author verdict on the 10 outputs — anchor diversity, doctrine compliance, convergence patterns.

operator_impact: Brief — bold anchors visible during the v2.8.2 window. Reverted within hours by v2.8.3 to pure prose 3 movements.
tested_on: Opus 4.7 simulation on 10 scenarios via stress test harness (passed)
an early-stage DTC pilot live (failed operator taste test — bold anchors felt template-flavored)
caught_by: Largo flagged that pure-prose synthesis lacks scaffolding for fast scanning — adaptive named anchors proposed as compromise.
known_gaps: REVERTED in v2.8.3. Adaptive named anchors over-corrected — bold-section labels read as form-fill scaffolding even when content was non-templated. The prose-first doctrine of v2.8.1 was cleaner.
Stress test harness retained in research/ as a future evaluation primitive — useful even though this specific output reverted.
